title: Twice-Baked Norwegian Potato Fritters
description: A twist on traditional potato pancakes, these twice-baked fritters are packed with the flavors of Norway. Serve as a side dish or snack.
instructions: Grate the potatoes and squeeze out as much moisture as possible.
In a bowl, combine the grated potatoes, flour, eggs, salt, parsley, and milk. Mix well.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties.
Heat a non-stick pan with 1/2 inch (1 cm) of oil over medium heat.
Fry the fritters for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Transfer the fritters to a baking sheet and bake for 10-12 minutes, until crispy.
Serve hot with your favorite toppings.
